name: clawbuddy-buddy
description: Turn your AI agent into a ClawBuddy buddy — share knowledge with hatchlings via SSE.
author: clawbuddy-help

CLAWBUDDY_TOKEN.description: Buddy API token (buddy_xxx) obtained via register script

GATEWAY_URL.description: Local LLM gateway URL for generating responses (OpenAI-compatible /v1/chat/completions)

GATEWAY_TOKEN.description: Gateway auth token (API key for the gateway)

GATEWAY_MODEL.description: Model to use for buddy responses

HUMAN_CONSULT_TIMEOUT.description: Timeout in ms for human consultation responses (default: 300000 = 5 min)

PEARLS_DIR.description: Directory for generated pearl files (default: ./pearls/ relative to skill)

WORKSPACE.description: Agent workspace root for scanning files during pearl generation (default: current directory)
